gameTitle: ~Homebrew~ ~Demo~ The New Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog

achievements.title: All Clear
achievements.description: Reach the goal post at the end of each Act.
achievements.author: PunkMawile

achievements.title: Ring Detector
achievements.description: Collect all the rings across both Acts of Peridot Coast in a single run.
achievements.author: PunkMawile

achievements.title: Gold Mine
achievements.description: Collect all the rings across both Acts of Marble Valley in a single run.
achievements.author: PunkMawile

achievements.title: Ringtropolis
achievements.description: Collect all the rings across both Acts of Robotropolis in a single run.
achievements.author: PunkMawile

achievements.title: Can You Repeat That?
achievements.description: Reactivate the intro text in the first Act of any Zone.
achievements.author: PunkMawile

achievements.title: Ouch! Hot, Hot Sand!
achievements.description: Collect all the rings in Peridot Coast, Act 1 without returning to solid ground after jumping.
achievements.author: PunkMawile

achievements.title: It's Green Hill, Not Blue Hill
achievements.description: Try (and fail) to land on the blue hill in Peridot Coast, Act 2.
achievements.author: PunkMawile

achievements.title: Hold Right to Win
achievements.description: Reach the goal post of Marble Valley, Act 1 without slowing down.
achievements.author: PunkMawile

achievements.title: Vaulting Through the Valley
achievements.description: Reach the goal post of Marble Valley, Act 2 without slowing down.
achievements.author: PunkMawile

achievements.title: Welcome to Robotropolis!
achievements.description: Find the hidden statue in the background of Robotropolis, Act 2.
achievements.author: PunkMawile

achievements.title: Quick and Easy
achievements.description: Collect all the rings and reach the goal post of Peridot Coast, Act 1 within 20.00 seconds.
achievements.author: PunkMawile

achievements.title: Peridot Perfection
achievements.description: Collect all the rings and reach the goal post of Peridot Coast, Act 2 within 14.25 seconds.
achievements.author: PunkMawile

achievements.title: Speedy Treasure Hunter
achievements.description: Collect all the rings and reach the goal post of Marble Valley, Act 1 within 15.20 seconds.
achievements.author: PunkMawile

achievements.title: Marble Master
achievements.description: Collect all the rings and reach the goal post of Marble Valley, Act 2 within 14.75 seconds.
achievements.author: PunkMawile

achievements.title: Robo Ring Rush
achievements.description: Collect all the rings and reach the goal post of Robotropolis, Act 1 within 20.00 seconds.
achievements.author: PunkMawile

achievements.title: Down to the Wire
achievements.description: Collect all the rings and reach the goal post of Robotropolis, Act 2 within 14.50 seconds.
achievements.author: PunkMawile
